# Section 1192 Subchapter V Discharge - Guide [2026]
> Last updated: 2026-05-01

> Section 1192 governs discharge in Subchapter V small business cases. Nondischargeable debts, plan completion, and 2026 case law guide.

## About
section1192.org is part of the Open Bankruptcy Project (openbankruptcyproject.org), a 501(c)(3) nonprofit building free, open-source tools for bankruptcy court transparency.

## Key Pages
- Subchapter V Cramdown - Section 1191(b) Nonconsensual Confirmation: https://section1192.org/cramdown.html
- Subchapter V Discharge Timing - When Does the Discharge Occur?: https://section1192.org/discharge-timing.html
- Disposable Income in Subchapter V - Section 1191(c)(2): https://section1192.org/disposable-income.html
- Subchapter V Eligibility - Debt Limit and Requirements: https://section1192.org/eligibility.html
- Section 1192 Subchapter V Discharge - Guide: https://section1192.org/
- Subchapter V Success Rates - Federal Court Statistics: https://section1192.org/success-rates.html
- Subchapter V Trustee - Role and Responsibilities: https://section1192.org/trustee-role.html
- Subchapter V vs Traditional Chapter 11 - Comparison: https://section1192.org/vs-traditional-11.html
- Privacy Policy: https://section1192.org/privacy.html
